_publications._publicationTitle: Notch signaling via Hey1 and Id2b regulates Müller glia's regenerative response to retinal injury.

_contextSnippet: RNAseq identified 1,261 differentially expressed genes, of which 375 were reduced following Notch inhibition
details: DAPT treatment for 24 hours identified 1,261 differentially expressed genes in quiescent MG, with 375 genes reduced following Notch inhibition
